description: Workflow hooks. SessionStart injects provider-backed workflow authoring policy and cache-base context only when .workflow/config.yml exists in the active project. UserPromptSubmit reads mentioned and pending GitHub issue references through cache-aware provider reads and injects issue-cache-base-relative paths as additionalContext. Stop records session-mentioned issues as pending without provider reads or JSON output.

hooks.description: Block local workflow projection writes until required authoring files were read
Record reads of workflow authoring files in the session ledger
Inject workflow authoring resolver policy for configured workflow projects
Cache mentioned GitHub issue references and inject issue-cache-base-relative paths as additionalContext
Record session-mentioned GitHub issues as pending without provider reads or Stop JSON output
